ac_text: Given I am an Admin, when I access the user registration form, then I should be able to enter user details and select a role.
title: Admin successfully accesses user registration form and selects a role
classification_rationale: Validates the ability of an Admin to access the user registration form and select a role.
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in UAT environment.
User account exists with role Admin and has access to the user registration form.
steps: Access the user registration form.
Enter user details: Name: John Doe, Email: john.doe@example.com, Phone: +1-555-0101.
Select role: Manager.
expected_result: User details are entered successfully and role Manager is selected.
review_feedback: completeness: Missing execution detail or contains quality violations
actionability: Needs stronger data or step detail

completeness.reason: Missing execution detail or contains quality violations

actionability.reason: Needs stronger data or step detail

ac_text: Given I am an Admin, when I access the user registration form, then I should be able to enter user details and select a role.
title: Unauthorized user attempts to access user registration form
classification_rationale: Validates that unauthorized users cannot access the user registration form.
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in UAT environment.
User account exists with role Teller and does not have access to the user registration form.
steps: Attempt to access the user registration form.
expected_result: HTTP 403 is returned. Access is denied for the user.

ac_text: Given I am an Admin, when I access the user registration form, then I should be able to enter user details and select a role.
title: Admin submits user registration form with missing name field
classification_rationale: Validates that the system rejects submissions with missing required fields.
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in UAT environment.
User account exists with role Admin and has access to the user registration form.
steps: Access the user registration form.
Leave the name field blank.
Enter email: john.doe@example.com.
Enter phone: +1-555-0101.
Select role: Manager.
Click the Create User button.
expected_result: HTTP 400 is returned. Response body contains field-level error: Name is required.

completeness.reason: Has preconditions, steps, test data, and expected result

defect_detection.reason: Designed to catch failures or misbehavior

ac_text: Given I am an Admin, when I access the user registration form, then I should be able to enter user details and select a role.
